video_title: Fractions Are a Piece of Cake - Full Episode | Series 8 E24 | Numberblocks

segments.text: One hole! Hello! Thanks so much for inviting me to the fraction friends party!
Here, I brought you this! One hole up all for one hole me! Thank you!
Would you like to share? How do we share this?
One hole pike! All for you? All for me!
When you've only got one cake and your friends are coming round
You know you're going to need a plan of action
You're going to have to share equal parts to make it fair
Divide it up to everyone's satisfaction
Why not give it a try? It's as easy as pie
When you divide a cake into you get half each
One half and one half make one hole
One half for me and one half for you
One half is what you get when you divide by two
Divide it into pieces it's a fraction!
Take my advice and you'll make no mistake
Whichever way you slice it, fractions are a piece of cake
I'm one of two equal parts
I'm one part of a hole that's big and I did it to do
But what is more than two if you need to share?
When you divide a pie by three you get one third
It takes two more thirds to make one hole
One third for you and two thirds for me
One third is what you get when you divide by three
I'm one of three equal parts
I'm one part of a hole that's been divided into three
I'm one third, I'm one third
Fractions are what you get when you divide things into equal parts
It's easy when you know how!
When you divide a piece of pie or you get one quarter
And you know that four quarters make one hole
And we still got three more!
One quarter is what you get when you divide by four
I'm one quarter, so am I!
I'm one of four equal parts, I'm one quarter
I'm one part of a hole that's been divided into four
I'm one quarter, I'm one quarter, for sure!
All of half third quarters there must be more!
No matter how small if it's a part of a hole
Glowing into pieces is a fraction!
Take my advice until make no mistake
Fractions are a piece of cake
Fractions are a piece of cake!

How do we share this? One hole pike! All for you? All for me! Oh for us! It's as easy as pie What you need What you need Is a fraction Like us! Where it swings! But what is more than two if you need to share? That's easy! Look here! Potato pie! When you divide a pie by three you get one third It takes two more thirds to make one hole One third for you and two thirds for me One third is what you get when you divide by three Oh three more thirds! I'm one third, me two! I'm one third, me three! I'm one of three equal parts I'm one third, so arrayed I'm one part of a hole that's been divided into three I'm one third, I'm one third That's me, I'm me I'm no! I see! And you know that four quarters make one hole One quarter for you And we still got three more! One quarter is what you get when you divide by four What's a quarter? It's a fourth! Or anything you like!
